---
title: "Russell Goebel"
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    max-items: 3
---

I'm a statistician with a background in consulting and academic research. 
I care about epistemology, rigor, and the gap between how statistics is 
taught and how it's actually practiced.
This site is where I think out loud — about statistical methods, data 
analysis, and occasionally other things.

## Recent Writing
::: {#recent-posts}
:::

## Featured

**[Area-to-Area Spatial Prediction](slides/fastblm_and_spatintegrate.qmd)**

A walkthrough of `fastblm` and `spatintegrate` for satellite SIF downscaling — raster SAR models, Fourier-Matérn priors, and area-to-area kriging.
